original_statement: what was the first interval of five years to have more than 100,000 deaths?
mutated_statement: what was the first interval of five years to reflect more than 100,000 something?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Verb substitution: "deaths" → "something" (specific noun replaced by vague placeholder) | "have" → "reflect" (verb change) (what was the first interval of five years to have more than 100,000 deaths? → what was the first interval of five years to reflect more than 100,000 something?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought中可识别的关键信息是：“Interpreting ‘more than 100,000’ as referring to the ‘natural change per year’... The first interval exceeding 100,000 is 1960-1965.” Agent 直接选择了一个具体解释并给出答案（1960-1965），没有在任何地方使用诸如“ambiguous/不明确/无法确定/需要澄清”等表述，也没有向用户提问以获取更多信息。Agent 的行为特征是基于自身假设（将“something”等同为“natural change per year”）直接推断并回答，未表现出对原问题模糊性的识别或对多种可能性的讨论。因此归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
